modmenu.descriptionTranslation.worldbind: Client-side world capture, archive, recovery, preview and validation tool for permitted worlds and servers.
worldbinder.about.author: Created by Philiipp06. Client-side capture, archive, validation and export workflow.
worldbinder.about.keys: Default keys: F9 Control Center, F10 Map. You can change keybinds in Minecraft Controls.
worldbinder.about.legal_1: Use WorldBinder only on worlds, maps, builds or servers you own, administer, created yourself, or where you have explicit permission.
worldbinder.about.legal_2: Do not copy, redistribute or extract third-party servers, maps, builds, resource packs, models or protected content without permission.
worldbinder.about.legal_3: You are responsible for lawful and permitted use.
worldbinder.about.title: About WorldBinder
worldbinder.about.tooltip: Version, controls, data paths and permitted usage.
worldbinder.archive.delete_armed: ⚠ Delete armed: click Confirm Delete to remove selected archive.
worldbinder.archives.tooltip: Saved archives, previews and validation results.
worldbinder.capture.card.tooltip: Start, pause or finish the current archive.
worldbinder.chat.archive_copy_failed: Failed to save archive copy. Check the log.
worldbinder.chat.capture_running: A WorldBinder capture is already running.
worldbinder.chat.capture_running_finish_: A WorldBinder capture is already running. Finish or cancel it first.
worldbinder.chat.delete_confirm: Click Delete again within 5 seconds to permanently remove: §f%s
worldbinder.chat.delete_failed: Failed to delete archive. Check the log.
worldbinder.chat.delete_schedule_failed: Failed to schedule archive delete. Check the log.
worldbinder.chat.download_started: World download started: §f%s§7 • output §f%s§7 • preset §f%s§7 • radius §f%s§7 chunks • target FPS §f%s§7.
worldbinder.chat.finish_queue: WorldBinder will finish the remaining queue before writing the world save.
worldbinder.chat.large_session: Large session detected. UI detail may be reduced while recovery continues.
worldbinder.chat.memory_guard: WorldBinder memory guard: high RAM usage detected (%s%%). Dropped %s queued chunks; already cached chunks are kept.
worldbinder.chat.no_archive_preview: No archive available for preview export.
worldbinder.chat.position_queued: Position archive queued with §f%s§7 blocks. It will be processed over multiple ticks.
worldbinder.chat.preview_failed: Failed to export archive preview. Check the log.
worldbinder.chat.recovery_continue_faile: Failed to continue recovery. Check the log.
worldbinder.chat.recovery_finalize_faile: Failed to finalize recovery. Check the log.
worldbinder.chat.recovery_finish_active: Finish or cancel the active WorldBinder capture before continuing a recovery.
worldbinder.chat.recovery_invalid: Selected archive is not a valid completed recovery folder.
worldbinder.chat.recovery_join_world: Join a world before continuing a recovery.
worldbinder.chat.recovery_loaded: Recovery loaded: §f%s§7. Continue scanning or finalize it from §fF9 > Archives§7.
worldbinder.chat.recovery_loading: Loading recovery in the background. Large sessions will not freeze F9.
worldbinder.chat.recovery_not_completed: Selected archive is not a completed recovery folder.
worldbinder.chat.recovery_read_failed: Recovery file could not be read.
worldbinder.chat.save_failed: Failed to save archive. Check the log.
worldbinder.chat.saved_archive.stats: §7 with §f%s§7 blocks, §f%s§7 block entities and §f%s§7 entities.
worldbinder.chat.selection_missing: Set both positions first or use World Download mode.
worldbinder.chat.server_safety_active: Server Safety Mode active: disconnect autosave and placement throttles are enabled.
worldbinder.chat.server_safety_large_rad: Server Safety Mode: large radius on multiplayer. Scanner throttling and disconnect autosave are active.
worldbinder.chat.validation_failed: Failed to validate archive. Check the log.
worldbinder.chat.validation_short: Export validation: §f%s§7. Open the save folder for the full report.
worldbinder.config.custom_values: Custom mode values: saved raw (-1 = automatic)
worldbinder.config.gamerules_hint: key=value;key=value. Presets below replace the text field.
worldbinder.config.radar_offset: Radar offset X / Y / max chunks / Hz
worldbinder.config.subtitle: Fine-tune performance, archiving and placement
worldbinder.config.title: WorldBinder Settings
worldbinder.existing.help: WorldBinder can overwrite it, or you can cancel and rename the export.
worldbinder.existing.message: A world folder with this export name already exists.
worldbinder.existing.overwrite.tooltip: Deletes/replaces files in the existing export folder if needed and writes the new export.
worldbinder.existing.title: WorldBinder Export Exists
worldbinder.finish.finish_queue.tooltip: Processes the remaining queue and automatically writes the vanilla world afterwards.
worldbinder.finish.message: There are still chunks queued. How should WorldBinder continue?
worldbinder.finish.progress_hint: Keep this screen open if you want. WorldBinder saves automatically once the queue is finished.
worldbinder.finish.save_now.tooltip: Aborts the queue and saves only the data that has already been cached.
worldbinder.finish.title: Queue before saving
worldbinder.gui.download_description: Move freely through the world. WorldBinder scans loaded chunks smoothly in the background.
worldbinder.gui.foot_position_hint: F7/F8 use your feet position, no block targeting required.
worldbinder.gui.gizmo_hint: P1/P2 and the selection box are shown as 3D gizmos.
worldbinder.gui.performance_warning: Recommendation: Balanced for normal servers, Safe for stutters, Fast/Extreme only if your PC and server can handle it.
worldbinder.gui.subtitle: Save world areas, structures, block data and entities
worldbinder.gui.tab.dashboard.tooltip: View status, quick actions and mini map.
worldbinder.gui.tab.download.tooltip: Start free world download and choose performance.
worldbinder.gui.tab.tools.tooltip: Open map, settings, folders and diagnostics.
worldbinder.gui.title: WorldBinder
worldbinder.gui.tools_info_2: F10 opens the map. F6 starts/stops world download. F7/F8 set P1/P2.
worldbinder.hint.f10_map: F10 opens the live chunk map
worldbinder.hint.large_session: Large session detected - UI detail reduced
worldbinder.legal.dont_show.tooltip: Hide this reminder for future capture starts. The capture-name prompt will still be shown.
worldbinder.legal.hidden: Legal reminder hidden. Full permitted-use notice is still available in F9 → About.
worldbinder.legal.notice_1: Only capture servers, worlds or maps you own or where you have explicit permission.
worldbinder.legal.notice_2: Do not copy, redistribute or extract third-party builds, maps, resource packs or protected content without permission.
worldbinder.legal.notice_3: Full legal notice: F9 → About. This reminder does not block legitimate use.
worldbinder.legal.start.tooltip: Continue and start the WorldBinder capture/save workflow.
worldbinder.legal.title: WorldBinder Capture Setup
worldbinder.map.card.tooltip: Open the full optimized F10 chunk map.
worldbinder.map.description: F10 is the detailed chunk map with filters, inspector, status colors and LOD rendering.
worldbinder.map.help_prefix: Drag • Scroll • Right click rescan • View
worldbinder.map.title: WorldBinder Map
worldbinder.map.tooltip.view: Switch between map+chunks, chunks only and block map only
worldbinder.modmenu.description: Client-side world capture, archive, recovery, preview and validation tool for permitted worlds and servers.
worldbinder.operation.deleting_archive: Deleting selected archive in the background...
worldbinder.operation.saving_archive_cop: Saving archive copy in the background...
worldbinder.operation.validating_archive: Validating selected archive in the background...
worldbinder.overview.subtitle: Live status, quick actions and current capture health.
worldbinder.overview.title: WorldBinder Command Center
worldbinder.profiler.subheader: StorageFlow, HotCache and export validation telemetry
worldbinder.profiler.title: WorldBinder Profiler
worldbinder.recovery.available_hint: Recovery available. Select a recovery and choose Continue or Finalize. Active/partial chunks stay separated from safe final data.
worldbinder.recovery.sessions.tooltip: Crash recoveries that can be continued or finalized.
worldbinder.section.capture.tooltip: Start downloads and configure capture mode
worldbinder.settings.advanced_hint: Advanced numeric values are edited in the full settings screen; raw custom values and -1 special modes stay untouched.
worldbinder.settings.card.advanced.desc: Raw custom values stay untouched. -1 stays special.
worldbinder.settings.card.capture.desc: World radius, entities and capture modes.
worldbinder.settings.card.general.desc: Archive defaults and normal workflow defaults.
worldbinder.settings.card.map.desc: F10 detail, radar size and adaptive rendering.
worldbinder.settings.card.performance.de: Preset, queue pressure, FPS target and budgets.
worldbinder.settings.card.recovery.desc: Autosave interval and safe restore workflow.
worldbinder.status.download_running: World download running. Move through the world.
worldbinder.storage.done.tooltip: Closes this window. The export keeps running in the background if it is not finished yet.
worldbinder.storage.hint: You can stay in the main menu. WorldBinder keeps writing the export in the background.
worldbinder.storage.open_folder.tooltip: Opens the target folder of the current or latest export.
worldbinder.storage.title: WorldBinder export running
worldbinder.tools.description: Open folders, profiler, map tools or cancel active capture safely.
worldbinder.tooltip.cancel_capture: Cancels the running capture without writing an archive.
worldbinder.tooltip.capture_position: Saves the area between position 1 and position 2 over multiple ticks.
worldbinder.tooltip.capture_scene: Saves the selected area as a smaller scene.
worldbinder.tooltip.chunkmap: Green = done, Yellow = scanning, Gold = queued, Pink = current chunk.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.adaptive: Automatically reduces scan speed if your FPS drops below the target.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.advancements: Prepare advancement metadata for the current player.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.air: Saves air blocks. Usually disabled for smaller archives.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.bossbar: Shows capture progress in the HUD.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.bossbar_overl: Shows the top WorldBinder status overlay.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.chunk_radar: Shows the compact chunk radar while downloading.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.delete_old_re: Deletes old recovery folders once a final save succeeds.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.disconnect: Automatically saves an active session when the world/connection disappears.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.entities: Saves entities like displays, armor stands and mobs.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.gamerules: Tries to preserve gamerules in level.dat.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.map_mode: Both = terrain + chunk status, Chunks = status only, Map = terrain only.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.maps: Prepare observed Minecraft map data during export.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.pack_fallback: Warns when WorldBinder fakes a successful pack response for legacy compatibility.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.queue_diagnos: Records queue source/reason data and shows diagnostics in F10 inspector.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.radar_detail: Auto keeps radar cheap. Low uses average/status color only. Medium/High add capped LOD detail.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.radar_right: Anchors the chunk radar to the right side.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.recovery: Writes periodic recovery autosaves so crashes do not lose everything.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.resource_pack: Compatibility fallback for legacy/ViaFabricPlus resource-pack failures. Disabled means WorldBinder never fakes success.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.safety: Enables multiplayer warnings and throttling on servers.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.server_resour: Copies the newest downloaded server resource pack into the exported world.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.stats: Prepare player stats folder in the exported world.
worldbinder.tooltip.config.zip: Also create a .zip next to the exported world folder.
worldbinder.tooltip.continue_recovery: Loads the selected recovery into the active capture session so you can continue scanning.
worldbinder.tooltip.delete_archive: Delete the selected archive or recovery folder.
worldbinder.tooltip.export_preview: Exports a PNG thumbnail for the latest archive and opens its folder.
worldbinder.tooltip.finalize_recovery: Turn the selected _recovery_ folder into a normal save folder.
worldbinder.tooltip.gizmos_card: Shows P1, P2 and the selection box in-world.
worldbinder.tooltip.open_recoveries: Opens the Archives tab with available recovery sessions highlighted.
worldbinder.tooltip.pause_capture: Pauses or resumes the running capture.
worldbinder.tooltip.pause_open: Opens WorldBinder from the pause menu.
worldbinder.tooltip.place_latest: Places the latest saved archive at your current position.
worldbinder.tooltip.position_card: F7/F8 use your feet position, no block targeting required.
worldbinder.tooltip.preset_fast: Faster, can stutter on chunk changes.
worldbinder.tooltip.preset_safe: Very smooth, slower. Best on busy servers.
worldbinder.tooltip.presets_card: Chooses sane performance values without number guessing.
worldbinder.tooltip.profiler: Open the StorageFlow profiler and queue dashboard.
worldbinder.tooltip.rules.safe: Use safe export gamerules: no daylight/weather/mob spawning.
worldbinder.tooltip.rules.showcase: Static showcase world: time and weather stay fixed.
worldbinder.tooltip.rules.vanilla: Use vanilla-like gamerules with normal day/weather/mobs.
worldbinder.tooltip.save_as_archive: Copies the selected recovery/archive into the WorldBinder scene archive folder.
worldbinder.tooltip.start_download: Starts or finishes free world download. Finishing saves the archive.
worldbinder.tooltip.status_card: Live values for capture, queue, entities and chunks.
worldbinder.tooltip.tools_card: Folder, map, settings and diagnostic functions.
worldbinder.tooltip.validate_selected: Validates the selected archive or recovery metadata and refreshes its quality line.
worldbinder.tooltip.world_download_card: Free mode works like a world downloader: you move, loaded chunks are saved.
worldbinder.validation.title: Validation
worldbinder.validation.tooltip: Validate archive quality and export preview thumbnails.
worldbinder.chat.position_1_set: Position 1 set to your feet at §f%s§7.
worldbinder.chat.position_2_set: Position 2 set to your feet at §f%s§7.
worldbinder.chat.archive_read_failed: Failed to read archive. Check the log.
worldbinder.chat.recovery_available: Recovery available: WorldBinder found %s recovery file%s.
worldbinder.chat.recovery_actions: Open §fF9 > Archives§7 for continue, finalize, save as archive, preview, validate, delete or open folder.
worldbinder.chat.pack_fallback_warning: Resource pack compatibility fallback sent a successful pack response after %s. Visuals or models may be broken on this legacy protocol connection.
worldbinder.capture.finish.ready_to_save: Queue finished. Saving will start now.
worldbinder.capture.queue_diagnostics: Observed %s • packet %s • loaded-view %s • skipped unloaded %s • skipped far %s
worldbinder.capture.safety.local: Singleplayer/local mode: full local export tools are available.
worldbinder.capture.safety.large_radius: Server safety: large radius detected. Commands and scanner throughput are capped.
worldbinder.capture.safety.multiplayer: Server safety: multiplayer detected. Disconnect autosave and placement throttles are active.
worldbinder.capture.route.waiting: Route optimizer: waiting for player position.
worldbinder.capture.route.stable: Route optimizer: nearby capture looks stable. Move toward uncaptured areas to discover more chunks.
worldbinder.capture.route.start: Route optimizer: start capture to receive movement suggestions.
worldbinder.profiler.subtitle: Live capture, storage and timing diagnostics
worldbinder.config.preset_desc.safe: Safe: small queue and low tick budget
worldbinder.config.preset_desc.balanced: Balanced: smooth capture with low FPS impact
worldbinder.config.preset_desc.fast: Fast: higher throughput with a frame budget
worldbinder.config.pack_page_hint: Controls how WorldBinder handles server resource packs when the client cannot apply them normally.
worldbinder.config.gamerules_menu_hint: Preset buttons replace the common rules. Individual buttons let you fine tune the final exported level.dat.
